brief: Study the storytelling structure of a dental clinic homepage: observed narrative arc, how trust signals are sequenced, where the primary action appears relative to proof, and what evidence supports each structural interpretation.

requiredSignals.description: Study output is tagged with a studyType.
Summary of observed narrative structure is present.
At least one finding is recorded.
Every finding includes observed evidence — not only an interpretation.
Every finding includes an interpretation of what the evidence means structurally.
Every finding includes a handoff pointer to the next skill in the pipeline.
No invented interpretations stated as certain fact without supporting evidence.
